seedanceSegments.title: Loaded bite hook
seedanceSegments.description: Open on a sexy loaded toasted-bread scoop through whipped feta and strawberry salsa, then briefly reveal the final bowl.
seedanceSegments.prompt:
Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural Licorn kitchen context, not as camera framing. Use @KitchenIslandDefault as the active island surface and shallow-bowl plating view. Use @DesiredFinalDishVisual only as the desired final dish styling target: white whipped feta base, red strawberry salsa mound, herbs, toasted bread and chips nearby. Use @Spoon only as the spoon/scoop shape reference. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseThreeQuarterLeft only to preserve visible hand identity during the bread scoop.

Kitchen continuity lock: keep the same light terrazzo countertop, clean Licorn kitchen materials, and shallow bowl on the island.

Generate exactly 4 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels sensual food-porn ASMR style, macro texture-first, no text on screen.

Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Only close-up ASMR: crisp toast scrape, sticky feta lift, wet strawberry juice.

Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.1s toasted baguette edge drags through thick white feta and ruby salsa; 1.1-2.0s loaded bite pauses near camera with feta peaks and strawberry cubes clinging; 2.0-3.2s hard cut to shallow bowl matching @DesiredFinalDishVisual, bread/chips nearby; 3.2-5.0s second tiny drag leaves a glossy red-white smear.

Scale and quantity lock: bread slice is palm-width, 7-10 cm long; salsa pieces are 0.8-1.2 cm diced cubes; central salsa mound covers about one third of the feta surface, not a tiny garnish, not full-bowl coverage.

Global negatives: no text, no captions, no music, no speech, no face close-up replacing food, no sexualized character, no puree, no soup-like feta, no giant strawberries, no miniature garnish.

seedanceSegments.continuity: Opening pays off the final dish immediately, then later segments reconstruct the same diced salsa, whipped feta, shallow bowl and bread. Maintain the creator-provided final visual style.
seedanceSegments.risk: Food-porn tone can drift into character sensuality; keep sensuality entirely in texture, gloss, cream, juice and crunch. Scale drift risk if strawberry dice and salsa mound size are not restated.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: crisp toast scrape through thick cream; sticky feta lift; wet strawberry juice settle

seedanceSegments.title: Ruby salsa build
seedanceSegments.description: Dice strawberries, add herbs, jalapeno, lime and chili powder, then fold into a chunky glossy salsa.
seedanceSegments.prompt:
Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural kitchen context, not as camera framing. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead as the active overhead prep view. Use @Spoon only as the mixing utensil reference. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseTopDown only to preserve visible top-down hands during prep.

Kitchen continuity lock: same light terrazzo island and clean Licorn kitchen palette; no stovetop or oven.

Generate exactly 7 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 6 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. Sensual food-porn ASMR macro prep, no text on screen.

Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Only knife taps, fruit tumble, herb sprinkle, citrus squeeze, spice dust and wet spoon fold.

Mandatory timing: 0.0-0.8s knife slices strawberries into small glossy dice; 0.8-1.5s diced berries tumble into bowl; 1.5-2.1s chopped basil and cilantro rain over berries; 2.1-2.7s tiny deseeded jalapeno cubes slide in; 2.7-3.5s lime juice squeezes in bright droplets; 3.5-4.1s chili powder falls in a red-brown veil; 4.1-6.0s one spoon fold keeps salsa chunky and glossy.

Scale lock: strawberry pieces are 0.8-1.2 cm dice, not halves, not puree, not oversized; jalapeno is tiny dice, not rings; herbs are visible chopped leaves, not green dust. Bowl holds about 2 cups diced strawberries.

Global negatives: no blender, no red sauce, no mashed fruit, no whole strawberries left in the salsa bowl, no invisible hands, no text, no music.

seedanceSegments.continuity: The salsa created here reappears in segments 05-07. Keep it chunky with 0.8-1.2 cm strawberry dice, green herb flecks, jalapeno dice and glossy lime-chili juice.

seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: knife taps; soft fruit tumble; leafy sprinkle; lime squeeze; spice dust; wet chunky stir

seedanceSegments.title: Whipped feta satin
seedanceSegments.description: Feta, cream cheese and honey transform from crumbly dairy into thick satin whipped feta.
seedanceSegments.prompt:
Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural kitchen context. Use @KitchenIslandDefault as the active island appliance view. Use @Blender only as the food processor/blending appliance shape reference. Use @Spoon only for the final spoon lift. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseThreeQuarterLeft only for visible hand identity.

Kitchen continuity lock: light terrazzo island, same Licorn kitchen, no stove or oven.

Generate exactly 6 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. Sensual ASMR dairy transformation, no text on screen.

Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Only processor click, crumbly cheese drop, sticky honey, short whirr, dense creamy spoon lift.

Mandatory timing: 0.0-0.6s processor bowl on island with feta, cream cheese and honey nearby; 0.6-1.2s feta crumbles drop in; 1.2-1.7s softened cream cheese slabs drop in; 1.7-2.5s honey ribbons slowly over white cheese; 2.5-3.6s hard cut to short blending vortex; 3.6-5.0s spoon lifts smooth whipped feta holding soft peaks.

Texture lock: final feta is thick, fluffy and satiny with soft peaks; not runny, not grainy, not whipped cream foam. Honey is amber and viscous, disappearing into the white dairy.

Global negatives: no text, no music, no speech, no splashing liquid, no soup texture, no grainy curds in final spoon lift, no uncontrolled appliance morphing.

seedanceSegments.title: White feta spiral
seedanceSegments.description: A shallow bowl receives thick whipped feta and the spoon turns it into a glossy spiral.
seedanceSegments.prompt:
Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural kitchen context, not as camera framing. Use @KitchenIslandDefault as the active shallow-bowl plating view. Use @Spoon only as the spreading utensil reference. Use @DesiredFinalDishVisual only as the final bowl composition target, but show the bowl before salsa.

Kitchen continuity lock: same light terrazzo island and shallow bowl as the final image target.

Generate exactly 4 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 4 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. Sensual macro ASMR, no text on screen.

Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Only ceramic touch, dense dairy plop and slow creamy spoon scrape.

Mandatory timing: 0.0-0.6s shallow bowl centered on island; 0.6-1.5s thick spoonful of whipped feta drops into bowl; 1.5-2.8s spoon presses and pulls one broad white spiral; 2.8-4.0s final spoon turn leaves a glossy central hollow.

Texture and geometry lock: whipped feta is thick and satiny with ridges that hold; bowl is shallow and wide; spiral fills most of the bowl surface and leaves a central hollow for salsa. Not soup, not whipped cream, not a tall cup.

Global negatives: no text, no music, no speech, no runny feta, no random garnish yet, no extra hands, no over-stirring.

seedanceSegments.title: Strawberry salsa crown
seedanceSegments.description: The ruby salsa is spooned over the white feta spiral in a central mound matching the desired final image.
seedanceSegments.prompt:
Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural kitchen context, not as camera framing. Use @KitchenIslandDefault as the active plated-bowl view. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead only for top-down spooning moments. Use @Spoon only as the topping utensil reference. Use @DesiredFinalDishVisual only as the final dish styling target: central red strawberry salsa over white whipped feta, herbs visible, bread and chips nearby.

Kitchen continuity lock: same shallow bowl, same light terrazzo island, same clean Licorn kitchen materials.

Generate exactly 5 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. Sexy food-porn macro plating, no text on screen.

Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Only wet spoon dip, juicy lift, fruit drop on cream and soft settling juice.

Mandatory timing: 0.0-0.8s chunky salsa glistens in bowl; 0.8-1.7s spoon lifts a generous mound and red droplets fall; 1.7-2.8s salsa lands in the feta hollow; 2.8-3.7s red juice creeps down one white ridge; 3.7-5.0s plated bowl matches @DesiredFinalDishVisual with toasted bread and chips close by.

Plating quantity lock: salsa mound covers about one third of the feta surface and remains centered; it is generous, not a tiny garnish, not full-bowl coverage. Strawberry dice stay 0.8-1.2 cm and chunky; no puree.

Global negatives: no text, no music, no speech, no tomato salsa, no red jam, no full red coverage, no tiny garnish, no floating spoon.

seedanceSegments.title: Crunch through cream
seedanceSegments.description: Toasted baguette slices frame the bowl, then one piece scoops through the feta and salsa for the main ASMR payoff.
seedanceSegments.prompt:
Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural kitchen context. Use @KitchenIslandDefault as the active plated-bowl and bread view. Use @DesiredFinalDishVisual only as final dish composition and dipper styling target. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseThreeQuarterLeft only to preserve visible hand identity during the scoop.

Kitchen continuity lock: same shallow bowl, same red-white dip, same light terrazzo island, toasted baguette slices and optional chips close by.

Generate exactly 5 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. Sensual food-porn ASMR crunch and cream, no text on screen.

Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Only toast shuffle, crisp tap, scrape through thick cream, sticky lift and wet settle.

Mandatory timing: 0.0-0.7s 5-7 toasted baguette slices fan beside bowl; 0.7-1.3s hand selects one slice and taps bowl edge; 1.3-2.6s toast cuts into feta swirl and pushes through salsa; 2.6-3.7s toast lifts loaded with feta, strawberries, herbs and chili-lime shine; 3.7-5.0s lingering red-white smear remains in bowl.

Scale and contact lock: baguette slice is palm-width, 7-10 cm long, with crisp browned holes; loaded bite visibly contacts and carries both feta and chunky salsa. Not a dry chip floating above the dip.

Global negatives: no text, no music, no speech, no empty dipper, no detached topping, no face replacing the food, no oversized bread slab, no miniature garnish.

seedanceSegments.title: Final Licorn satisfaction
seedanceSegments.description: Luma presents the finished dish in the Licorn kitchen, with final macro bites and a lingering red-white hero surface.
seedanceSegments.prompt:
Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural kitchen context. Use @KitchenIslandWide as the active final context view with Luma visible behind the island. Use @KitchenIslandDefault only for close plated-bowl cutaways. Use @DesiredFinalDishVisual only as the desired final dish styling target. Use @CharacterSheet, @CharacterExpressions and @PoseFront only to preserve Luma identity, satisfied expression, and presentation pose.

Kitchen continuity lock: finished bowl remains in Licorn kitchen on light terrazzo island; character supports the food, food remains hero.

Generate exactly 5 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. Sexy ASMR food finish, no text on screen.

Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Only bowl slide, crunchy dip, sticky cream lift and quiet kitchen ambience.

Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.0s Luma presents finished bowl behind island, satisfied but not overacting; 1.0-1.8s loaded chip or baguette corner dips into the red-white swirl; 1.8-2.7s extreme macro of finished surface, white ridges, red salsa, green herbs and chili specks; 2.7-3.8s Luma leans in pleased while food stays foregrounded; 3.8-5.0s final lingering hero close-up of ruby juices pooling in thick white spiral.

Final composition lock: shallow bowl, white whipped feta ridges, central red strawberry salsa mound, green herb flecks, toasted bread/chips nearby, matching @DesiredFinalDishVisual. No text, no logo overlay, no extra final shot.

Global negatives: no text, no captions, no music, no speech, no character stealing focus, no sexualized character, no tomato sauce, no puree, no kitchen redesign.
